tasks.title: Move _decode call inside try block to prevent TypeError masking original WASM error
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial single-line restructure: wrap _decode inside try, add null-guard before r.free() in finally. No design decisions needed.

tasks.title: Add runtime assertion data.length === width * height * 4 before returning JpegDecodeResult
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial one-line guard. No design judgment needed — the invariant is fixed by the pixel format (RGBA8).

tasks.title: Introduce typed JpegDecodeError class wrapping WASM errors to allow callers to distinguish decode failures
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires designing a minimal error class with cause and code fields, then wiring it into the catch path. Straightforward but involves a small API shape decision.

tasks.title: Verify scale() returns actual decoded dimensions and use post-decode info if they can diverge
tasks.reason_for_tier: Uncertain finding requiring inspection of jpeg-decoder 0.3 internals to confirm whether scale() output dimensions always match actual decoded pixel count. Needs reasoning about the crate API contract before deciding whether to use decoded.width/height.

tasks.title: Add contract test suite for decodeJpegScaled covering field presence, buffer length invariant, and error behavior
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward but requires writing a test harness for the WASM module, choosing a test fixture JPEG, and covering 4 distinct contract cases. Needs judgment on test framework selection.

tasks.title: Add cargo audit / cargo deny CI step for fast-jpeg WASM supply chain
tasks.reason_for_tier: CI configuration not visible in reviewed files; cannot confirm or deny existing audit steps. Needs broader CI context before implementing. Deferred as ADR draft.
